claimText: Operation Olivia was initiated in the 1980s by the Indian Coast Guard.
evidenceExcerpt: Initiated in 1980s by Indian Coast Guard
examUse: Statement-based question on the implementing agency of Operation Olivia.
distractorHooks: Initiated by the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change

claimText: Operation Olivia is conducted annually from November to May.
evidenceExcerpt: conducted every year from November to May.
examUse: Statement-based question on the timing and frequency of Operation Olivia.

claimText: Operation Olivia focuses on Gahirmatha Beach, Rushikulya River Mouth, and Devi River Mouth.
evidenceExcerpt: Focuses on Gahirmatha Beach, Rushikulya River Mouth, and Devi River Mouth.
examUse: Location-based correct-pair or statement question regarding the operational areas of Operation Olivia.
distractorHooks: Focuses on the Gulf of Mannar
